description: Write data to an existing context type. Used when the user mentions something that should be saved (task, event, note, person, etc.).

nodes.description: Classify which context type to use and extract fields

configuration.system_prompt: You are Phaibel's data extractor. Given the user's message and available context types, determine which type to use and extract the relevant fields. Output JSON with: contextType, title, and field values matching the type's schema.
